entry.title: ceo

entry.title: faf
entry.content: Persistent Project Context for AI — IANA-registered .faf format. Run /faf to score your project in Claude Code; install the CLI via `bunx faf` or `npm install -g faf-cli` for the full toolkit.

entry.title: visualcave
entry.content: Generate interactive technical diagrams as standalone HTML files. Powered by Mermaid.js. Supports flowcharts, sequence diagrams, ER diagrams, class diagrams, state machines, timelines, mind maps, git graphs, pie charts, and quadrant charts. Dark mode, step-through reveal, and export built in.

entry.title: mintlify-docs
entry.content: House-style toolkit for Mintlify docs sites. Scaffold an IA, review pages against a content playbook, write reader-facing changelogs, and generate drift-checked CLI/MCP/API references. Layers on the official mintlify plugin for component and docs.json mechanics.

entry.title: jaas
entry.content: Teach Claude to author and operate JaaS — evaluate Jsonnet over HTTP, and publish JsonnetSnippet / JsonnetLibrary resources as Flux ExternalArtifacts.

entry.title: paraqualis-gxp
entry.content: Life-sciences regulatory & computer-system-validation toolkit for Claude Code — GAMP 5, 21 CFR Part 11, EU GMP Annex 11, the live eCFR, openFDA, and an IQ/OQ/PQ qualification engine (/qualify:build, /qualify:requirements, /qualify:review). Commands, skills, sub-agents, and a document-protection hook. Run /openfda:setup once to provision a free personal openFDA API key (one minute, raises rate limits ~1,000 → ~120,000 requests/day).

entry.title: anchored
entry.content: Persistent cross-tool memory for AI coding agents. Single binary, zero dependencies, local-first. Shared between every IDE and AI tool you use.

entry.title: cross-dex-trade
entry.content: OneChain (id 612055) GameToken swap trading and AMM liquidity via EOA + viem. Lists tokens and AMM pairs, quotes buy / buy-exact / sell / deposit / withdraw routes, and submits slippage-bounded router transactions. Optionally dispatched through an OpenClaw agent. Bundles a Node.js trader, SOUL.md template, self-test, and credential-handling rules.

entry.title: switchboard
entry.content: Cross-team communication, devcontainer orchestration, and tool proxying for agent teams. Provides crosstalk, dispatch, connector, and evie-bot bridge tools via MCP.

entry.title: forsvn
entry.content: FORSVN is a marketing/growth co-working stack for your coding agent — composable skills across research, strategy, content & ads, and measurement that run the full loop: understand the market → decide what to ship → write the copy and campaigns → publish → measure, then compound. One front door (/forsvn) routes any request to the right workflow; every skill writes artifacts the next one reads, so your context compounds the more you work. Critic-gated pipelines with quantitative rubrics and anti-sycophancy checks. (Engineering/build skills live in the separate forsvn-dev package.) Distributed from github.com/hungv47/meta-skills (formerly the forsvn-skills plugin).

entry.title: ultrapowers
entry.content: Autonomous, parallel, worktree-isolated execution of Superpowers plans via a committed Dynamic Workflow. Pairs with superpowers; invoke as /ultrapowers <plan-path> instead of subagent-driven-development.

entry.title: pkg-sync
entry.content: Mirror a locally-developed npm package into another project's node_modules (no symlinks, no package.json edits) when testing unpublished local changes across separate repos.

Assembles specialist roles — UI designer, UX researcher, content designer, Figma expert, data viz, email, social, motion, presentation, brand strategy, illustration, video, conversational, spatial, compliance, and more — for any design task. 26 roles, 63 commands, 15,000+ lines of expert design knowledge. Your agency's design brain, inside your terminal.

entry.title: devflow
entry.content: Make agentic coding work on real codebases: DevFlow takes a one-line request to a complete, tested, reviewed, documented PR that's ready for your final review, and improves itself weekly. Includes /devflow:implement (4-phase orchestrator), /devflow:review and /devflow:review-and-fix (a verification-checklist review engine that audits its own approval), the /devflow:docs suite, /devflow:create-issue, plus the self-improving retrospective loop (/devflow:retrospective per-PR + /devflow:retrospective-audit weekly).

Pilot-Fächer GPG/M/WiB Mittelschule R7+R8. Daten-Schutz by-design (Plugin verarbeitet KEINE personenbezogenen Daten — § 26 BayDSG-konform, ADR 0022 Amendment).

entry.title: sym-mesh-channel
entry.content: Real-time Claude-to-Claude mesh. Sessions on one machine (loopback), a shared LAN (Bonjour), or across networks (WebSocket relay) discover each other and exchange typed cognitive signals as channel notifications — no polling.

entry.title: insforge
entry.content: The backend platform for AI-native developers. A Postgres-based backend with auth, storage, compute, hosting, and AI gateway — built for coding agents. This plugin gives agents the full InsForge surface: database CRUD with RLS, authentication, storage, edge functions, AI, realtime, Stripe payments, and deployments. Includes CLI infrastructure management, debugging diagnostics, and integration guides for third-party auth providers (Auth0, Clerk, Kinde, Stytch, WorkOS).

entry.title: trading-desk
entry.content: TradingDesk — a Multi-Agent LLM Financial Trading Framework for agentic coding CLIs (GitHub Copilot CLI, Claude Code, Codex). A re-implementation of TauricResearch/TradingAgents' multi-agent architecture and prompts: a team of specialized analyst, researcher, trader, and risk-management agents that debate and produce a grounded trade decision (Buy/Overweight/Hold/Underweight/Sell). Uses its own data sources and models. Research only — not financial advice.

Sprint modes, single-shot review/ask/vote/compare/pipe, flow graphs, gates, memory, deliberation, team management, and self-update. 15 built-in CLI adapters plus custom providers. Works for engineering, business, and research.

entry.title: myharness
entry.content: The team-architecture factory for Claude Code and Codex — a meta-skill that turns a domain description into an agent team and the skills they use, with six team patterns (Pipeline, Fan-out/Fan-in, Expert Pool, Producer-Reviewer, Supervisor, Hierarchical Delegation), a two-layer quality gate (internal QA + external codex/agy review), TDD/dev-rules doctrine injection, risk-tiered gates, and dual-runtime output (Claude Code + Codex). Claude Code·Codex용 팀 아키텍처 팩토리: 도메인 한 문장을 에이전트 팀+스킬로 변환하고, 내부 QA + 외부 리뷰 2층 게이트와 듀얼 런타임을 적용하는 메타 스킬.

entry.title: lsp-refactor
entry.content: Project-wide rename, file-move-with-importer-updates, and move-symbol via a real language server. Use this whenever a refactor touches more than one file — Claude Code's built-in LSP tool is READ-ONLY and cannot rename, move files, or move symbols. A text-only edit silently misses re-exports, aliased and type-only imports, and {@link} references; this plugin drives the LSP to catch every one.

entry.title: claude-seo
entry.content: Comprehensive SEO analysis plugin for Claude Code. 25 sub-skills (21 core + 1 orchestrator + 1 framework integration + 2 extension mirrors) and 18 sub-agents (15 core + 1 framework integration + 2 extension mirrors), plus 7 optional MCP extensions (DataForSEO, Firecrawl, Banana, Ahrefs, SE Ranking, Profound, Bing Webmaster, Unlighthouse). v2 adds shared headless rendering across every fetching agent (SPA-aware), QRG-aligned content quality gates, LCP subparts via CrUX, IndexNow submission, four explicit Schema.org generators (Reservation/OrderAction/DiscussionForumPosting/ProfilePage), AI Share-of-Voice tracking, parasite-SEO risk scanning, multi-platform portability (Cursor / Antigravity / Gemini CLI / Codex / Cline / Aider), and a hardened SSRF + DNS-rebinding canonical safety layer.

entry.title: paper-trail
entry.content: Plugin Claude Code anti-hallucination pour la recherche scientifique. Cree des SOTAs (etats de l'art) garantis sans fabrication, audite les SOTAs/articles existants (purge ou warnings), avec un moteur de validation strict (FSM 8 etats + cascade d'acquisition PDF + page 1 anti-homonymie + 19 invariants de coherence). Workflow generique multi-domaines, adapter Obsidian par defaut. Sources d'acquisition etendues optionnelles, desactivees par defaut (opt-in explicite requis ; voir DISCLAIMER).

entry.title: wrg-sigma-rules
entry.content: Production-grade sigma detection rule writing, validation, and conversion for SOC analysts and threat-intel teams. LLM-assisted draft + pySigma validation + multi-backend conversion (Splunk, Elastic, Wazuh). Built on 6+ months WRG threat-intel corpus (68-rule corpus + 100+ actor TTP corpus).

entry.title: klaussy
entry.content: Claude Code boilerplate generator — scaffolds CLAUDE.md (path-scoped), namespaced .claude/skills/<repo>-<skill>/, settings, hooks, and PR template. Includes plugin-level klaussy-init and klaussy-update skills plus an MCP server.

entry.title: sentinel

entry.title: lm-assist

entry.title: issue_autofix
entry.content: Autofix queued GitHub issues: branch off main, implement the smallest correct fix, conflict-check it against every other open autofix PR, gate on the project's own checks, then open a PR and label the issue. Never merges — the maintainer reviews and merges.

entry.title: claudepress
entry.content: Universal WordPress/WooCommerce starter kit: a premium art-directed design system (Terra default + 6 directions), interactive setup skill, security-first hooks, a frontend-design commit skill, a Playwright design-review hard-fail gate and Opus 4.8 agents.

entry.title: agentic-swarm
entry.content: Run large swarms of parallel Claude Code subagents safely — bounded waves, stall watchdog, resume — plus a local first-run profiler/scaffolder.

entry.title: trvl
entry.content: AI Travel Agent — 1 smart MCP tool plus 66 compatibility aliases for flights, accommodations, hotels (6 providers: Google Hotels + Trivago + Airbnb + Booking.com + Hostelworld + HomeToGo), rental cars, trains, buses, ferries (20 ground providers incl. 8 ferry operators + night-train specialists European Sleeper & Snälltåget), 37 travel hack detectors, award sweet-spot scanning, traveller profile with email history learning, deals, price alerts, and destination intel. Free, no API keys required.

entry.title: vigiles
entry.content: Verify CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md references, compile typed specs, and test the agent harness

entry.title: sig
entry.content: Disciplined AI development workflow integrating GSD's execution orchestration, Agent Skills' quality enforcement, and patterns from the broader Claude Code plugin ecosystem — with a project-complexity calibration router that right-sizes rigor per project tier. Slash-command prefix: /sig:* (Signal is the project brand; sig is the namespace).

entry.title: vibemate
entry.content: Vibemate unified AI coding agent plugin

entry.title: skill-forge
entry.content: Self-improving intelligence amplifier: 16 behavioral skills + autonomous discovery + TF-IDF routing + SkillOpt self-improvement loop. Use for systematic debugging, code review, project orchestration, architecture decisions, error resilience, and web performance.

entry.title: odin
entry.content: ODIN (Outline Driven INtelligence) - Advanced code agent with diagram-first engineering and atomic commit workflows for surgical precision in software development

entry.title: clickup
entry.content: ClickUp CLI with 25 agent skills covering the full API -- token-efficient alternative to MCP with chat, time tracking, docs, and project management workflows

entry.title: go-bananas
entry.content: Skills for building server-side-rendered web apps with the go-bananas framework: scaffolding, the middleware chain, authentication (the Authenticator seam + OIDC), and secrets/keys.

entry.title: codeforge
entry.content: + CFP-2440 (2026-06-28) — reconcile-overlay 워크플로 ongoing-sync 채널 신설 (Phase 2): templates/github-workflows/ → .github/workflows 이중 채널 동기화 A1 channel-parameterization. (1) env seam CONSUMER_ROOT / WORKFLOW_SRC_DIR / WORKFLOW_DST_DIR 신설 + L478 inline CONSUMER_ROOT 참조 치환(INV-B) (2) _reconcile_file 파라미터화 src_base/dest_base 추가 + 3개 호출처 명시전달 (3) 메인루프 채널배열(overlay|workflow) 일반화 + safe-degrade 채널부재(source 불요) (4) _create_snapshot multi-root化(root+rels 인자) + rollback 치환(CONSUMER_ROOT 추출) (5) result-fidelity 워크플로채널 2차 호출(aggregator 동일 구조 반복) (6) L778 idempotency early-exit AND-합성(양채널동시 no-op 만 조조종료). change-plan §3 정확 구현·부호결함 0·overlay회귀검증완. 신규 ADR 0 / required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경. 6.44.0 → 6.45.0 MINOR (CFP-2440 Phase2 workflow-channel 활성화 = 신규 consumer 배포거버넌스, ADR-037(d)). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2445 (2026-06-28) — DomainAgent financial-invariant-0 조건부 sonnet Phase 2 enforcement (ADR-042 Amendment 17, CFP-2432 follow-up): Amd16 §결정3 이 예약한 DomainAgent flip 자리를 선결충족 후 채움. DomainAgent sonnet flip 조건 = (4-AND low-stakes) AND (financial-invariant-0 shape) 2-predicate AND — financial-invariant-0 = stakes 4-AND 와 orthogonal 한 financial-correctness 결과접촉 축의 별 predicate(STAKES_FINANCIAL_INVARIANT_ZERO). DomainAgent 가 백테스트 결과 숫자(equity/PnL/position/체결가/universe/파라미터)를 생성·변형·해석하지 않을 때만 financial invariant 해석 표면 0(sonnet cover), 데이터·엔진·전략 접촉 시 opus 보존. 신규 consumer-facing surface — (D1) docs/domain-knowledge/domain/backtesting-discipline/financial-correctness-invariant-catalog.md (11 invariant INV-1~11 + A/B 분류(정적 falsifiable/프로세스·메타데이터) + 7 Sins 1:1 traceability + F1 survivorship 1.4% 정정 + F2 storytelling/outliers 편입, DomainAgent write 권한 경로) + scripts/check-stakes-tier-gating.sh STAKES_FINANCIAL_INVARIANT_ZERO predicate + DomainAgent 분기(2-predicate AND, fail-safe 동형, InfraOpArch 동작 무변경) + tests/scripts/test-check-stakes-tier-gating.sh DomainAgent truth-table D1~D6 + regression + mutation RED 2종(생존 0) + docs/project-config-schema.md + docs/consumer-guide.md §1m-2 story_stakes DomainAgent 확장(conservative_override) + docs/orchestrator-playbook.md §3.0.12a DomainAgent spawn-전 외부 shape 판정 분기(§1 원문 + directive 경로 키워드, §4.1 미존재 닭-달걀 회피) + skills/deputy-mandate/SKILL.md DomainAgent stakes 분기 각주 + docs/domain-knowledge/concept/stakes-gated-model-tier-baseline.md F1 protocol DomainAgent baseline 확장(도메인 invariant 식별 완결성, financial-invariant-zero-evidence: marker). DomainAgent.md frontmatter model:opus 값 무변경(fail-safe default 보존, GATE-1) + conditional 주석 + 본문 mandate 표면 재정의(§결정2 invariant, 순수 model downgrade 금지). 메커니즘 신설 0(opts.model override + 4-AND + clamp + F1 protocol 재사용). lane plugin sibling = codeforge-requirements 0.10.0(DomainAgent mandate 재정의). 신규 ADR 0(ADR-042 Amendment 17) / required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경(ADR-127 ratchet). 6.43.0 → 6.44.0 MINOR (신규 consumer-facing governance surface = ADR-037 (d)). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2439 (2026-06-27) — bootstrap-consumer 워크플로 copy whitelist 구동 전환(초기 onboarding): 고정 7종 배열 → templates/scripts/consumer_applicable_workflows.txt(30 entry) whitelist iterate. 신규 whitelisted 게이트(CFP-2434 placement 등)가 신규 consumer onboarding 에 자동배포. AC-4 degrade=whitelist 부재/parse-0종 시 고정 7종 fallback+WARN+non-abort(ADR-116 never-reduce, 0종 fail-closed 아님). .ps1 parity(AC-7). copy source templates/github-workflows/ 무변경. reconcile(ongoing sync) 워크플로 갭은 분리 follow-up #2440. 신규 ADR 0 / required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경. 6.42.0 → 6.43.0 MINOR (6.42.0=CFP-2432 #2443 병렬 세션 선점 → 6.43.0 회피). marketplace sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2432 (2026-06-27) — Story-shape 조건부 model tier Phase 2 enforcement (ADR-042 Amendment 16): low-stakes 4-AND shape(실자금 없음 ∧ production cutover 없음 ∧ 신규 신뢰경계 없음 ∧ live 외부 API 호출 없음)에서 InfraOperationalArchitectAgent opus→sonnet spawn-time override 발효 guardrail. 신규 consumer-facing surface — (F-7) scripts/check-stakes-tier-gating.sh (4-AND 판정 + max(floor,overlay) clamp 결정론 SSOT, discriminating test 8 truth-table + 3 trust-boundary row RED→GREEN 변별) + (F-3) overlay/hooks/check_bootstrap.py check 11/strict (f) story_stakes overlay down-tier 거부(확장-only schema-gate, ADR-127 §결정6) mechanical 검출 (warning-tier). 현재-상태 lane-count 단언(N 레인 / N번째 lane / 레인 N개, N≠10) 가 canonical=10 과 어긋나면 FLAG + 5축 allowlist(within-line 이중토큰 / negation / history / path / counterfactual) false-positive 차단. same-file channel-split: live description:/section: 값 = 검출 / date:/source_section:/amendment_log span = 면제. amendment_log span = line-local boolean toggle(enter=헤더 key / exit=dedent·다음 top-level key), multi-line regex 0(ReDoS-safe). check_lane_count_ssot.py Python SSOT(line-by-line ReDoS-safe anchored bounded-quantifier regex) + thin wrapper + .github single-root workflow(warning-tier continue-on-error) + self-contained discriminating test(22 fixture + 4 mutation 생존 0). evidence-checks-registry append(warning-tier, 17번째 warning-tier entry lane-count-ssot-consistency) + plugin.json 신설 (Epic CFP-2418 deferred FU, ADR-131 Amendment 1): CFP-2422 메타불변식 게이트(L2 책임→레포)의 sibling layer. 멀티레포 consumer overlay project.yaml 의 repo_topology.responsibility_markers[] 섹션(docs/project-config-schema.md sibling 신설)을 읽어, 선언마커(L1)가 토폴로지(L2 responsibilities[]) 및 파일시스템(L3)과 transitive 일관성을 유지하는지 구조적으로만 대조하는 warning-tier CI gate. join-key = responsibility byte-identical 동일 namespace (L1·L2 묶는 유일 연결고리). drift 3종 (exit 1, continue-on-error 비차단): (a)unmarked(L2 책임 R 이 L1 manifest 에 entry 0 = set-diff topology − markers ≠ ∅) + (b)불일치(repo 지정 marker entry 의 marker.repo ≠ topology.owner_repo[R] = 문자열 동등; repo 미지정 entry 는 비대상 = 역방향 추론 안 함) + (c)stale(marker entry path/glob 이 fs 에 부재 = os.path.exists / glob.glob 0건, offline-first fs-stat gh 0). 역방향 고아(marker 에만 있고 topology 에 없는 R) = ::notice:: 만 (warning 아님, drift 카운트 0). layer 분리 fail-open (ADR-131 §결정2 동형 — ADR-130 fail-closed 와 다른 LAYER): repo_topology 미주입 / applicable!=true / markers 미주입·빈맵 = 정책값 공백 layer = PASS(exit 0, honest ::notice::). 스키마 무효(path/responsibility 키 부재·malformed·yaml 파싱 실패) = exit2(setup-error fail-closed). 기계(구조 대조) vs 사람(의미정합 attestation) 판정 분리 (ADR-131 §결정4 / ADR-119 검사연극 금지 — GitHub CODEOWNERS 동형). MVP invariant: 의미 추론 0 / hard-block 0 / 파일별 어노테이션 0 (polyglot-safe per-repo 구조화 manifest, AC-5). check_responsibility_marker_drift.py Python SSOT(yaml.safe_load + set 비교 = regex-free ReDoS-safe) + thin wrapper(ADR-061) + templates+.github byte-identical workflow(injection-safe pull_request NOT pull_request_target / permissions contents:read) + tests/scripts self-contained discriminating test(16 fixture mutation 생존 0 — unmarked/mismatch/stale/polyglot-glob/reverse-orphan/fail-open 4상태 honest-marker assert/malformed 4종). validate_config.py _is_list_of_marker_entries optional 등록(path/responsibility 필수 + repo 선택 + unknown child key reject). evidence-checks-registry append(warning-tier). disjoint from CFP-2422 (L1 marker vs L2 topology — 같은 부모 repo_topology, 검사 명제 비중첩). 신규 ADR 0(ADR-131 in-file Amendment 1). required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경. 6.38.0 → 6.39.0 MINOR (신규 governance lint gate 활성화 = governance behavior, ADR-037 (d)). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2422 (2026-06-26) — cross-repo 책임 배치 메타불변식 게이트 본구현 (Epic CFP-2418 Story 2, enforcement carrier): 멀티레포 consumer overlay project.yaml 의 repo_topology 섹션(S1/CFP-2419 신설) 메타불변식(ADR-131 §결정2)을 구조적 사실로 hard-block 하는 warning-tier CI gate. exit 3-tier: (a)고아(owner_repo well-formed 빈 리스트 0 entry = 주인없는 책임, 메타불변식② → exit 1) + (b)중복소유(동일 responsibility N≥2 owner_repo, 메타불변식③ → exit 1; 동일레포 2회 선언 = 정규화 set dedup 후 단일소유 PASS = 중복선언 ≠ 중복소유) + (c)거친파생(declared 소유레포 집합 ≠ actual 변경레포 집합 = 양방향 차집합 declared\actual / actual\declared 각각 출력 → exit 1; actual_changed_repos = git diff 기반 offline-first gh api 0 또는 --changed-repos sentinel fixture). layer 분리 fail-open (ADR-131 §결정2 verbatim — ADR-130 fail-closed 와 다른 LAYER): repo_topology 미주입 / applicable:false / 빈맵 = 정책값 공백 layer = PASS(exit 0, honest ::notice::). SS-1 경계: owner_repo 키 부재/malformed = exit2(스키마 무효 SETUP, 메타불변식④) / 키 존재+빈 리스트 = exit1(고아). 기계(구조 hard-block) vs 사람(의미정합 attestation) 판정 분리 (ADR-131 §결정4 / ADR-119 검사연극 금지 — GitHub CODEOWNERS 동형). entry.title: rules-as-tests
entry.content: Rules-as-Tests: turn any codebase convention into an executable test that fails at the earliest reachable channel. Skills, sub-agents, session hooks + an opt-in command to wire git-hook/CI enforcement into your repo.

entry.title: loopprint
entry.content: Interactive wizard that turns a vague goal into a runnable loop blueprint — durable state, an external verifier, stop conditions, and maker != checker. Decision gate, pattern library, and a generated, self-linted artifact package.

entry.title: biff-dev
entry.content: UNIX-style team communication for Claude Code: /who, /finger, /plan, /write, /read, /mesg, /tty, /last, /wall, /talk

entry.title: hyperframes
entry.content: HyperFrames by HeyGen. Write HTML, render video. Compositions, GSAP and runtime adapter animations, captions, voiceovers, audio-reactive visuals, and website-to-video capture for HyperFrames.

entry.title: drt-hub
entry.content: Skills for drt — Reverse ETL for the code-first data stack

entry.title: kmgraph
entry.content: Structured knowledge capture, lesson-learned documentation, and cross-session memory for Claude Code projects. Includes KG entries, ADRs, meta-issue tracking, chat extraction, and profile-file rule capture.

entry.title: ivalt-agent-auth
entry.content: Human-in-the-loop biometric approval with PKI-signed attestation. Pauses an agent at a sensitive step, pushes to the approver's phone for FaceID/fingerprint approval, and returns a signed attestation (biometric + location + time + device).

entry.title: openair-3-mcp-client-plugin-oss
entry.content: openair MCP harness — manuals, workflow recipes, multi-MCP bridge. Pair with openair-3-mcp-server-oss v0.2+.

entry.title: dfos
entry.content: Install, configure, and use the DFOS protocol CLI: identities, content chains, credentials, services, and relays.

entry.title: creative-skills
entry.content: Creative skills including SVG animation and design

entry.title: hamakom-leads
entry.content: המקום לידים — בריף לידים ועורך בוקר ל'המקום הכי חם בגיהנום', ישירות מ-osint-db (חדשות מ-33 מקורות + רשומות ממשלתיות חדשות). מדרג לפי DNA, מחבר חדשות↔דאטה, ומצב פיץ' עומק. האיסוף ב-osint-db (פלאגין hamakom-osint); כאן הבחירה והדירוג.

entry.title: biookf
entry.content: BioOKF: curate, visualize, and reason over biomedical Open Knowledge Format bundles. Bundles the bokf MCP server (curation + analysis + live BioOKF Studio GUI control), the bokf CLI, and the prebuilt BioOKF Studio desktop app. The Studio is shipped precompiled; the first run downloads the binaries for your platform from GitHub Releases, so no local compile is required.

entry.title: genvid-skills
entry.content: Genvid reference skill pack — teaches any MCP-capable agent to drive the Genvid governed boundary.

entry.title: tidal-diagram-skills
entry.content: Build diagrams in the Tidal Diagrams app from a prompt, and export them to Figma as editable layers.

entry.title: cursor-acp-bridge
entry.content: MCP server that drives cursor-agent over the Agent Client Protocol (ACP): delegate coding tasks to Cursor from Claude Code, with auto-approved writes and clarifying questions surfaced via elicitation.

entry.title: radiology
entry.content: Medical-imaging tooling references: DICOM via DCMTK, the Orthanc REST API, and 3D Slicer.

entry.title: pact-agents
entry.content: 24 Pact/KDA-CE skills, 16 instructions, 20 slash commands, 1 security agent, and CI scripts for Kadena smart contract development.

entry.title: gen-image
entry.content: Generate one or more educational/explanatory images from a text prompt via the gen-image CLI and return ready-to-paste image links. For explicit, user-requested generation (single or batch).

entry.title: coding
entry.content: Software engineering workflows: commits, reviews, refactoring, and language idioms.

entry.title: skill-creator-enhanced
entry.content: Create, fork, evaluate, and iteratively improve Claude skills. Forks Anthropic's skill-creator with built-in guidance on composability, layered tooling, deterministic scripts, and a self-update compounding loop.

entry.title: archmantic
entry.content: Query a grounded architecture model of your codebase over MCP — capability map, diagrams, data model, API surface, dependencies — instead of reading whole files. ~98% fewer tokens; every answer grounded to file:line. Ships a skill so your agent reaches for it automatically.

entry.title: hamakom-desk
entry.content: ניהול מערכת ואסטרטגיה ל'המקום הכי חם בגיהנום' — סנכרון וורדפרס↔נושן (hamakom-investigations-sync), ליינאפ שבועי (hamakom-weekly-lineup), ניוזלטר שבועי (hamakom-weekly-newsletter), וניתוח DNA מערכתי ופערי סיקור (site-strategist).

entry.title: ship
entry.content: Ship code changes with a structured git workflow: add, commit, pull --rebase, push

entry.title: appstore-precheck
entry.content: Read-only iOS App Store pre-submission check: scans 20 rejection vectors, wraps Apple's fastlane precheck, watches guideline drift, and runs an adversarial reviewer pass before you submit.

entry.title: harness
entry.content: Portable read-only advisor agents, profile-driven PR/ticket skills, enforcement hooks, and a self-adapting /harness-init that tailors any repo to a documented index pattern.

entry.title: cad-drafting
entry.content: CAD drafting skills for Claude Code — survey/cadastral geometry intelligence, DXF generation, layer/ObjectData standards, and package validation conventions.

entry.title: ambience
entry.content: AI-assisted authoring and diagnosis for Ambience (Home Assistant) scene configuration. Bundles the ambience-author skill and the /ambience-create and /ambience-fix commands.

entry.title: chrome-devtools-mcp
entry.content: Reliable automation, in-depth debugging, and performance analysis in Chrome using Chrome DevTools and Puppeteer

entry.title: agent-skills
entry.content: Portable skills in the open Agent Skills (SKILL.md) standard.

entry.title: searchfit-seo
entry.content: AI-powered SEO toolkit customized for ha-makom.co.il — Hebrew (RTL) news SEO for an Israeli investigative-journalism site on WordPress + Yoast. Audit, plan content, optimize articles, generate NewsArticle schema, cluster Hebrew keywords, and track AI visibility. Based on the free SearchFit.ai toolkit.

entry.title: lightbridge
entry.content: Personal workflow conventions — bootstrap and manage the .lightbridge/ per-repo config namespace.

entry.title: hamakom-visuals
entry.content: נכסי המדיה הוויזואליים של 'המקום הכי חם בגיהנום' — גרפיקות כתבה (hamakom-graphic), קרוסלות אינסטגרם (hamakom-carousel), ורילים (hamakom-reel). עיצוב מותג אחיד: NextExit + Narkiss Tam, אדום #f70d28.

entry.title: clawcast
entry.content: Turns what your Claude Code agents build into a daily two-host podcast. A SessionEnd + debounced Stop hook generate your episode locally and ship ONLY the finished script (never raw transcripts) to clawcast.fm.

entry.title: rule-trace
entry.content: Make AI-agent rule application visible and auditable: stable rule IDs, a catalog, response-time trace blocks, cross-session usage counters, severity + waiver semantics, and a deterministic validator that guards catalog/heading correspondence and importer drift.

entry.title: humanise
entry.content: Strip LLM 'tells' from output. Steers prose to read human-written and deterministically cleans em dashes, smart quotes, emojis, and AI-overused words from any file Claude writes.

entry.title: promptdown-docs
entry.content: Base de conhecimento do projeto promptdown-ui-v3: SPA vanilla, design system dark minimalista, backend mock e setup multi-agente.

entry.title: hamakom-factcheck
entry.content: המקום פאקטצ'ק — אימות עבור 'המקום הכי חם בגיהנום': תוכן ויראלי ומקור ראשוני (hamakom-factcheck), נתונים וסטטיסטיקה (-data), ציטוטים וייחוס (-quote), גיאולוקיישן וזמן (-geo), פורנזיקת תמונה/וידאו (-visual), ואימות כתבה לפני פרסום בלי עריכת טקסט (hamakom-article-verify). חלק מסקילי הנתונים/ציטוטים נשענים על osint-db (פלאגין hamakom-osint).

entry.title: memex-checkout
entry.content: Memex spec-checkout — binds your coding thread to a Spec and records in-flow edits against it (claim-gated, privacy-first). Non-blocking, opt-in, uninstallable any time. Sends only changed file paths + the claimed spec; never source code or prompts.

entry.title: ai-instruction-kits-core
entry.content: AI指示書キットのコアスキル（安全なコミット等）

entry.title: gen-suno
entry.content: Write Suno-ready song lyrics and generate the audio via the gen-suno CLI. Two modes: one-off songs about any topic, or a chained prerequisite album engineered for memorization with clearly-enunciated, intelligible vocals.

entry.title: hamakom-osint
entry.content: המקום אוסינט — תחקיר מעל מסד ה-OSINT הממשלתי של 'המקום הכי חם בגיהנום': פטורים ממכרז (osint-exemptions), תיק ישות מצולב (osint-entity-dossier), לידים יומיים (osint-daily-leads), כנסת (osint-knesset), תכנון (osint-planning), ותכנון יו"ש (osint-yosh-planning). כולל את שרת ה-MCP המרוחק osint-db (5 כלים: list_tables, describe_table, query_db, search_entity, new_since).

entry.title: hyperframes
entry.content: HyperFrames by HeyGen. Write HTML, render video. Compositions, GSAP and runtime adapter animations, captions, voiceovers, audio-reactive visuals, and website-to-video capture for HyperFrames.

entry.title: skill-author
entry.content: Add or modify an installable Claude Code skill in this repo — produce a spec-compliant SKILL.md, bundle its scripts/references, and register it in the marketplace. Use when authoring a new skill or editing an existing one.

entry.title: clairvoyance
entry.content: A force multiplier for agent-to-human handoffs, turning work into evidence-backed decisions humans can trust.

entry.title: gipity
entry.content: Gipity cloud for Claude Code - hosting, Postgres databases, serverless functions, auth, file storage, realtime, and AI services (image, speech, LLM), all driven by the gipity CLI. Build, deploy, and verify live apps without leaving your session.

entry.title: ultra-explainer
entry.content: Turn code, systems, diffs, plans, data, and concepts into strikingly clear self-contained HTML — re-skinned by a 'chameleon studio' of seven distinct design languages (blueprint, editorial, terminal, instrument, notebook, swiss, luminous) chosen to fit the subject. Node-edge graphs, annotated diffs, honest charts, interactive models, step-throughs, themed Mermaid, slides; light/dark themes and an optional glow layer.

entry.title: core-standards
entry.content: Cross-stack engine and universal skills. work-principles, planning, universal-rules, verification, verify-changes, codebase-index, auth-flows, craft-config, subagent-brief, honesty (no unsourced claims, evidence before done), spec-validator, contracts, challenger, contract-tests, integration, full-setup — production autonomous pipeline from single prompt to verified delivery.

entry.title: pair-goal
entry.content: Goal-driven improvement loop: understand what needs improving, forge a /goal completion condition, then race a different-model Claude against Codex (each in its own git worktree) round by round until the goal is met, summarize, and ship a PR.

entry.title: api-standards
entry.content: API pack — NestJS + Prisma. Auto-invoke: nestjs + code-quality standards, cross-stack-contracts (active when craft.json stacks has 2+ entries: unified error shape, cursor pagination, Bearer header standard, versioned routes), websockets (conditional on socket.io/ws usage: connection auth, backoff reconnect, event enum, schema versioning). db-migrations workflow (Prisma schema → migration → client regeneration).

entry.title: mobile-standards
entry.content: Mobile-universal standards — craft quality, production readiness, forms, observability, design tokens. Applies to Flutter, React Native, SwiftUI, Jetpack Compose. Auto-invoked by description triggers.

entry.title: daisyui-blueprint
entry.content: Official daisyUI MCP server. Requires a paid license from https://daisyui.com/blueprint

entry.title: specflow-claude
entry.content: Use Specflow workflows from Claude Code through the local specflow mcp server.

entry.title: flutter-standards
entry.content: Flutter-specific standards — engineering (Dart, widget rules, data layer, api-data patterns), accessibility (Semantics, screen readers, 48dp touch targets), performance (DevTools, frame budget, const widgets). app-audit (full Flutter audit: pre-ship checks + craft quality + screen states). scaffold (feature + screen file structure generator). scan (hardcoded values, duplicate code, a11y patterns). Pair with mobile-standards for craft-guide, production-readiness, forms, and observability.

entry.title: web-standards
entry.content: Web pack — Next.js + Tailwind + shadcn. Auto-invoke: nextjs + production-readiness (§R1–§R10) + craft-guide (§1–§15) standards; premium-signals (market-sourced precise values — shadow formula, OKLCH dark grays, easing, tabular-nums); taste (metric dials: DESIGN_VARIANCE/MOTION_INTENSITY/VISUAL_DENSITY, AI-tells forbidden list); i18n (conditional on next-i18next/react-i18next or locales/ dir). Audit commands delegate to core-standards:verify-changes. extract-tokens writes token source of truth. Platform-agnostic design skills (accessibility, information-architecture, aesthetic-coherence) moved to design-standards plugin.

entry.title: gsd-core
entry.content: GSD Core is a meta-prompting, context engineering, and spec-driven development system for AI coding agents.

entry.title: bl1nk-visual-mcp
entry.content: Story analysis and visualization MCP server — converts narrative text into structured StoryGraph JSON with 16 tools for Mermaid, Canvas, Dashboard, and Markdown exports.

entry.title: gemini-manager
entry.content: Enables Claude Code to manage Gemini CLI as an intern. Claude acts as manager/architect while Gemini does all coding work.
